In Oak’s Lab with no Pokémon; the priority is to get a starter from one of the Poké Balls.
The right-side Poké Balls are present, so I’ll interact with the nearest starter ball.

### Action_reasoning
Interacting with a Poké Ball in Oak’s Lab should trigger the starter selection sequence. Use the object interaction tool on the leftmost Poké Ball object listed.

### Actions
